name: AI, autonomy & target recognition
description: Software is India's comparative strength; ATR, swarm and mission-autonomy competitive.

name: Drone Rules 2021
description: India's civil drone regulatory framework: forms cut 25 to 5, approvals 72 to 4, drones to 500 kg, ~90% of airspace Green Zone to 400 ft.

name: MOSIP
description: Modular Open Source Identity Platform (IIIT Bangalore, 2018; Aadhaar model). Deployed in Philippines, Ethiopia, Morocco and piloting in 9+ countries; 100M+ IDs by 2023. India exports sovereign-identity software.

name: Hypersonics & scramjet propulsion
description: HSTDV flight-tested; a frontier where India is a credible early mover.
